case_title: KATHERINE BURNS VS. LUXOR CAB, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BURNS, KATHERINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUXOR CAB, INC. KREUTNER, DAVID LEE $4,366.00 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,511.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 35.00 - SERVED MAR-15-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KREUTNER, DAVID LEE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-26-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-26-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY RICK LARSEN--CLAIMS MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
